creator: john.wolfe@broadcom.com
text:
I am wondering about the status of this bug report.

(In reply to Martins from comment #7)

Martins, 

You opened the bug but now indicate that things are working.  Are there any issues to be investigated or resolved from your perspective?


(In reply to Franco Fichtner from comment #6)

Franco,

Was your comment in response to "what version of open-vm-tools" is being used with OpnSense?   Are you having any issues at the moment?


(In reply to w.schwarzenfeld from comment #3)

Was the "ping" in comment 3 simply a prod to progress the bug or register another problem with attempts at guest customization?
